description_long: This is a modern two-story house surrounded by a fenced yard, featuring a mix of black and white exterior walls. The property includes a driveway with a parked car, a small swimming pool, and landscaped greenery with palm and deciduous trees. Large windows and glass doors provide ample natural light, with balconies and terraces visible on the upper floor. The flat roof and clean geometric lines emphasize a contemporary architectural style. The house is set within a rectangular lot, with a combination of paved, grassy, and garden areas.
description: A modern two-story house with black and white exterior, large windows, a driveway, pool, and landscaped yard within a fenced lot.
description_view_0: This view shows the black side of the house, with large windows, a tree, and a section of the fenced yard.
description_view_1: The white facade is prominent here, with a balcony, pool, and palm tree visible along the side yard.
description_view_2: The front of the house is shown, featuring the driveway, car, main entry, and a covered patio area with outdoor seating.
description_view_3: This angle highlights the black exterior, main entryway, driveway, and lush landscaping with trees and shrubs.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and balcony doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a glass door with a paved approach, no porch, and minimal overhang, emphasizing clean lines and modern simplicity.
